$comment: Pyxis golden mat_openpbr_mx_coat_full — MaterialX open_pbr_surface with full coat lobe (coat_weight=1, warm coat_color, low coat_roughness). The coat highlight must take on the warm tint, distinguishing this from the UsdPreviewSurface clearcoat path (no clearcoatColor input). Catches mistakes where coat_color is dropped or where the MaterialX→OpenPBR mapping reuses UsdPreviewSurface defaults.
